from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import *
import json
import requests
import re

# configuration
PRISMA_SCHEMA_URL = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Planning-Inspectorate/peas-row-commons/main/packages/database/src/schema.prisma"

# get workspace name
workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == 'pins-synw-odw-prod-uks':
    storage_account_name = 'pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk'
elif workspace == 'pins-synw-odw-dev-uks':
    storage_account_name = 'pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz'
else:
    raise ValueError(f'Unknown workspace: {workspace}')

csv_base_path = f'abfss://mpesc@{storage_account_name}.dfs.core.windows.net/MPESC-EXTRACT'
print(f'csv path is: {csv_base_path}')

print('Starting datalab csv schema validation ...')
print(f'Workspace: {workspace}')

total_rows = sum(entity_row_counts.values())
print(f"total rows: {total_rows:,}")

for entity, count in sorted(entity_row_counts.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True):
    pct = (count / total_rows * 100) if total_rows else 0
    print(f" {entity:.<30} {count:>10,} ({pct:>5.1f}%)")

print(f"\n Entities: {len(csv_files)}, {total_rows:,} records")
